description:
Are you trying to break into government contracting — or scale what you've already started? 
Register now for our 1 day crash course  (limited seats): https://www.govclose.com/govclose-workshop

Join Lt. Col. (Ret.) Rick Howard and Col. (Ret.) Louis Orndorff for a one-day Federal Sales Workshop in Houston, Texas on March 25, 2026.

Between the two of them, they've managed $82B in federal contracts, commanded contracting offices, and trained hundreds of business owners and BD professionals to win government business.

By the end of the day, you'll have:
✅ A clear picture of how the federal government actually buys
✅ Confirmation of whether — and how much — the government buys what you sell
✅ A target list of your top federal agencies and offices
✅ The foundation of a real federal pipeline
✅ A realistic path to your first (or next) contract

📍 Royal Sonesta Hotel | Houston, Texas
📅 March 25, 2026 | 9:00 AM – 4:00 PM
🎟️ Register now (limited seats): https://www.govclose.com/govclose-workshop

---

WORKSHOP AGENDA:
9:00 AM — Welcome & Introductions
9:20 AM — Module 1: The History of Government Contracting
10:00 AM — Module 2: How Government Contracting Really Works
11:00 AM — Module 3: The Data — Your Secret Advantage
12:00 PM — Working Lunch & Q&A
1:00 PM — Module 4: Building a Strategic Pipeline
2:00 PM — Module 5: Meetings Win Contracts
2:30 PM — Module 6: Proposals & Post-Award (Col. Orndorff)
3:30 PM — GovClose Certification Overview
4:00 PM — Networking & Social Hour

---

🔔 Subscribe for weekly insights on winning government contracts:
https://www.youtube.com/@govclose



---
